Dynamic rewards and relic hunting

HomeGetting StartedAdventurer LevelsPlanar RiftsBreach GatesWorld BossesCreaturesLoot and RelicsShrines and LoreBounty BoardsReference

Loot and Relics

Nosivad rewards scale with risk. Rarity, creature strength, rift status, breach grade, and boss status all influence what can drop.

Dynamic Loot

Dynamic loot can roll from common through mythic. Better odds come from harder mobs, higher rarity enemies, rift and breach modifiers, and world boss kills.

Graded Breach Gear

Graded gear uses the same E/D/C/B/A/S scale as players and Breach Gates. Gear cannot roll above the grade of the breach dungeon it came from.

SourceGraded Gear Notes
Normal breach mobRare chance, improved by mutation and grade.
Mutated breach mobBetter odds as mutation rarity increases.
Breach bossGuaranteed graded gear drop.

Relics

Relics are rare named equipment templates that can surface through high-quality dynamic loot, rifts, world bosses, and special rewards.

RelicSlotRole
Blade of the First RiftWeaponMelee damage.
Bow of Planar PathsWeaponRanged damage.
Staff of the VeilWeaponCaster staff.
Focus of TormWeaponCaster focus.
Aegis of BahamutShieldDefense.
Helm of the WatchHeadHeavy armor.
Chestguard of MoradinChestHeavy armor.
Leggings of the Astral PathLegsHeavy armor.
Robe of Lolth's WhisperChestCaster robe.
Cloak of CorellonCloakUtility.
Ring of RiftfireRingOffense.
Necklace of Pelor's DawnNecklaceDefense.
